inputs.label: Applied Force
inputs.businessContext: Design force acting on the welded joint.

inputs.label: Allowable Shear Stress
inputs.businessContext: Allowable shear stress for the weld material, as per applicable welding code (e.g., AWS D1.1, EN 1993-1-8).

inputs.label: Number of Welds
inputs.businessContext: Number of fillet welds sharing the load.

inputs.label: Length per Weld
inputs.businessContext: Effective length of each individual fillet weld.

inputs.label: Safety Factor
inputs.businessContext: Design safety factor to account for uncertainties.
